validate.notes: Docker build passes. NOP test (base commit) correctly returns reward=0. Gold test (with fix applied via solve.sh) correctly returns reward=1. Rubric judge returns 0.0 because it evaluates /workspace/repo (base commit, no changes) rather than the gold Docker image - the judge architecture expects git diff but the gold solution commits to Docker. Removed changeset-related rubric rules as they conflict with no changesets instruction. Remaining style rules cannot be validated in this setup.
